LightningComponentBundle.description: Digital Front Door home page for Experience Cloud guest users. Provides hero search, quick-action cards, and an Agentforce health-assistant launcher.

property.name: brandName
property.label: Brand name
property.description: Display name shown in the header logo and footer.

property.name: emergencyPhone
property.label: Emergency / Urgent Care phone
property.description: Phone number for the always-visible Emergency / Urgent Care call-to-action.

property.name: agentLaunchUrl
property.label: Agentforce launch URL
property.description: Optional URL for launching the embedded Agentforce health assistant (Messaging for Web deployment URL or Experience site path).
